The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate digestive issues and reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. The bioactive constituents of Sideritis solstitialis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Sideritis solstitialis is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture to take advantage of its health benefits.
